name: solsp-vscode
description: Thin VS Code client for the solsp Solidity language server (outline, diagnostics, semantic highlighting).

solsp.server.path.markdownDescription: Absolute path to the `solsp-server` binary. If empty, the extension looks for a Cargo build under the workspace's `target/debug` then `target/release`, and finally falls back to `solsp-server` on `PATH`.

solsp.trace.server.description: Trace the JSON-RPC traffic between VS Code and solsp-server (for debugging).

enumDescriptions: A hint before every positional argument.
Hints, except where the argument already repeats the parameter name.
solsp.inlayHints.parameterNames.markdownDescription: Parameter-name inlay hints before positional call arguments (e.g. `transfer(to: addr, amount: 1)`). Reload the window after changing.
